goal: Continue optimization with low-risk hardening: safer backend defaults, in-memory match lifecycle cleanup, minimal socket subscription validation, and runtime baseline gate reinforcement.
constraints: Do not break existing local PvE flow.
Prefer additive and backward-compatible server changes.
Keep changes within active runtime and pipeline files only.
deliverables: Backend listen host and CORS defaults hardened for local development safety.
In-memory match store gets TTL-based cleanup to avoid unbounded growth.
Socket match subscription validates player identity against match participants when provided.
New runtime baseline validator added and wired into daily gate.
Server README updated with new env defaults/notes.
